title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
